code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let bo = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bo
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if in_num
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, 0 - val)
          else
            result = list.push(result, val)
          end
          in_num = false
          neg = false
          val = 0
        end
      else if b == 45
        if not in_num
          neg = true
          in_num = true
        end
      else if b == 43
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
        end
      else
        in_num = true
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - val)
    else
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_one_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one_line()
let line2 = read_one_line()

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut all: List<Int> = []
for v in a
  all = list.push(all, v)
end
for v in b
  all = list.push(all, v)
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut has_last = false
mut last = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  mut found = false
  mut cur = 0
  for v in all
    if has_last and v <= last
      ()
    else
      if not found
        cur = v
        found = true
      else
        if v < cur
          cur = v
        end
      end
    end
  end
  if not found
    done = true
  else
    sorted = list.push(sorted, cur)
    last = cur
    has_last = true
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
